root.sql:
select sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code ,decode(sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code,'01','ฉุกเฉิน' ,decode(sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code,'02','สามัญ','พิเศษ')) as loan_group_desc ,sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ,sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description ,sum(sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.emer_balance) as emer_balance from sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal ,sc_lon_m_rule where 1=1 and sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.emer_loantype = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type /*WHERE*/ --and sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.emer_contact_status = '0' --and sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.balance_date = to_date('31/10/2025','dd/mm/yyyy') group by sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code ,sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ,sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description
order by sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code ,sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type
